laws.title: Consistent Typography
laws.description: Ensure that typography is consistent across the website for better readability and brand alignment.
laws.design_token: font-family: SF Pro Text, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
laws.remediation: Use a design system to maintain typography consistency throughout the site.

laws.title: Color Scheme Coherence
laws.description: The color scheme used should align with Apple's branding and should be consistent across all pages.
laws.remediation: Implement a color palette with well-defined primary, secondary, and accent colors.

laws.title: Button Styling
laws.description: Buttons should have a consistent style that includes clear call-to-action text.
laws.remediation: Use a uniform button style guide that includes default, hover, and active states.

laws.title: Whitespace Use
laws.description: Appropriate use of whitespace helps to focus the user’s attention and improves readability.
laws.remediation: Adjust margins and padding to ensure content is not crowded and flows naturally.

laws.title: Iconography Consistency
laws.description: Icons should have a consistent style and size for uniformity across different site sections.
laws.remediation: Use a single icon set across the website and ensure all icons adhere to the same style.
